title: daucus gingidium subsp. atlanticus
intro: Daucus gingidium subsp. atlanticus, also known as Wild Carrot, is a subspecies of the Daucus carota plant family, native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Daucus gingidium subsp. atlanticus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
